Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Process steps described 1 Resume Parsing Initial Data Check with a loop for missing information RequestMoreInfo 2 Preliminary Skill Assessment 3 Cultural Fit Community Affiliation Check Potential Bias Point 4 Managerial Review Final Decision

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets define the activities ReceiveApplication DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo SkillAssessment CulturalFitCheck CommunityAffiliationCheck ManagerialReview FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: First Model POWL Model with Potential Unfairness Start with a loop for Data Completeness LoopDataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo Followed by SkillAssessment Followed by an XOR choice XCulturalFitCheck CommunityAffiliationCheck Followed by ManagerialReview Followed by FinalDecision

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait is ReceiveApplication needed The text says Applicants first submit their resumes Once the basic application data is received 1 Resume Parsing Initial Data Check So lets include ReceiveApplication at the very beginning Lets refine the activities for Model 1

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Second Model POWL Model Without Unfairness Same loop for data completeness LoopDataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo SkillAssessment CulturalFitCheck no XOR everyone goes through this ManagerialReview FinalDecision

Name: Validation - IND
Text: Is there any detail I missed Applicants below a certain score threshold may be disqualified while those above the threshold proceed This could be modeled as an XOR choice but the prompt specifies the XOR branch for unfairness at the Cultural Fit stage I will stick to the requested XOR

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Lets double check the loop definition a loop between the submodels A and B execute A then either exit or execute B and then A again Loop execute DataCompletenessCheck If complete exit If not execute RequestMoreInfo then DataCompletenessCheck again This perfectly matches

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: The final decision is then made either approving the candidate for hire or rejecting them Should FinalDecision be an XOR Approve Reject Lets add that XOR to both models for completeness

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait should FinalDecision be a simple transition or an XOR The prompt suggests FinalDecision as a label I will just use Transition label FinalDecision to keep it simple and aligned with the prompt suggested labels

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The code looks solid properly reflects the process described in the text uses the correct pm4py POWL classes correctly implements the loop and XOR logic and correctly distinguishes the biased model from the unbiased one
